text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin appears to be grouchier<n>than usual.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nnngh, dammit! I'm gonna freakin'<n>EXPLODE!
choice_data_list: What happened?
What happened?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Who cares what happened?! Ugh!Just thinking about it makes me mad!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I navigate through her ire, I<n>manage to get
Narita Taishin to<n>explain what's going on.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, an Umamusume who lost<n>to her at a
scrimmage recently<n>mocked her for being small.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
She was all like, "You got lucky this<n>time. But if you
don't get taller,<n>you're not gonna be able to keep
this<n>streak going, pipsqueak."

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Losing sucks—I get that. But talk<n>about bad
sportsmanship.
choice_data_list: That's horrible.
That's horrible.

text_block_list.text:
Seriously. I just can't catch a break...<n>That's been
bugging me this whole<n>time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Screw this! I'm gonna run laps till I<n>drop today!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm heading to the track. Later.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And with that, she runs off.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I meet up with Narita Taishin later and<n>help her
train.
Huff, huff...
choice_data_list: Feel better?
Feel better?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not one bit. My blood's still boiling.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I knew a regular training session<n>wouldn't be
enough for me. I'm<n>gonna train some more, so
you go on<n>ahead without me.
choice_data_list: I actually think you should call it a day.
I actually think you should call it a day.
Okay, but don't overdo it.
Okay, but don't overdo it.
Yeah! Go big or go home!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I knew a regular training session<n>wouldn't be
enough for me. I'm<n>gonna train some more, so
you go on<n>ahead without me.
choice_data_list: I actually think you should call it a day.
I actually think you should call it a day.
Okay, but don't overdo it.
Okay, but don't overdo it.
Yeah! Go big or go home!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Excuse you? Why the heck would I<n>do that?!
choice_data_list:
Because it'll be bad if you overexert yourself and
get sick.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But!
choice_data_list:
You'll just be proving that other Umamusume
right.

You'll just be proving that other Umamusume
right.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell her how resting properly and<n>forgetting about
it is the best way to<n>get back at her opponent.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I guess you have a point.
Fine. I'll go home and get some<n>sleep.

I hate following your advice, but I hate<n>the idea of
her gloating over me even<n>more.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'm out.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Narita Taishin's anger<n>has subsided
completely. It seems<n>resting properly did her some
real<n>good.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Don't overdo it? Pfft. Like half-assed<n>training'll do
me any good.
choice_data_list:
You should channel that energy into your next
race.

You should channel that energy into your next
race.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Training to perfection and conquering<n>her next
race will feel so much better<n>than letting her anger
consume her<n>now.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Upon explaining this to Narita Taishin,<n>a wicked
grin spreads across her<n>face.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Is that permission to grind that stupid<n>sore loser
under my heel and<n>humiliate her in our next
scrimmage?
choice_data_list: Er, not exactly...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm gonna do it anyway. My<n>rage won't
stop unless I do.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Sounds like a plan.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Just watch! I'm gonna make sure<n>she never
trash-talks me again!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With her fighting spirit ablaze, Narita<n>Taishin
devises a plan to put the sore<n>loser in her place.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, duh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna feel any better with<n>just a leisurely
jog around the park!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll run until I forget all about her!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Raaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm feeling pretty good already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All right, one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's rage is potent fuel,<n>and she
continues her solo training<n>for a long while
afterward.
Argh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's not enough. I'm still mad as hell!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But I can't move anymore...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin burns herself out and<n>sits there on
the spot, unable to<n>stand...
